name: Imagineer Platform CDN Configuration
description: Comprehensive CDN setup for global performance optimization

response.content: {"error": "Too many login attempts. Please try again later."}

firewall_rules.description: Block admin access from non-authorized IPs

filter.expression: (http.user_agent contains "bot" and not http.user_agent contains "googlebot" and not http.user_agent contains "bingbot")
(http.request.method eq "POST" and http.request.uri.path contains "/api/" and not http.request.headers["content-type"][0] contains "application/json")

cache_rules.description: Cache static assets for 30 days at edge, 1 year in browser
Cache application pages for 5 minutes with device/geo variations

api-rate-limiting-worker.js.description: Advanced rate limiting for API endpoints
